a:T89b8,<div class="question">
<p>The graph shows the effect of changing the substrate concentration on the early stages of an enzyme-catalysed reaction.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: left;">What can be interpreted about the rate of reaction from the graph?</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">A.  Rate of reaction increases up to a point and then remains constant.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">B.  Rate of reaction increases linearly with increasing substrate concentration.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">C.  Rate of reaction increases non-linearly with increasing substrate concentration.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">D.  Rate of reaction is not affected by any change in the substrate concentration.</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.1.HL.TZ0.8"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-5-enzymes"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
